description: Coverage Manager published universe artifacts. Downstream projects should read these files instead of importing Coverage Manager code or hitting fundamentals providers directly. Files are committed to git so consumers get history, reproducibility, and rollback.

files.name: universe.csv
files.purpose: Canonical coverage universe ticker list (snapshot of data/coverage_universe_tickers.csv)

files.name: universe_metadata.json
files.purpose: Generic structured metadata keyed by ticker: {name, sector, subsector, sub_subsector}. Contains only tickers from the source CSV — no consumer-specific augmentation.

files.name: universe_status.json
files.purpose: Versioned status + validation contract (read schema_version before consuming)

files.name: watchlist.csv
files.purpose: Personal watchlist joined with universe metadata — all coverage universe columns plus Buy Price, Target Price, Date Added, Notes appended at the end.

files.name: watchlist.json
files.purpose: Watchlist entries joined with the full universe row: {ticker: {buy_price, target_price, date_added, notes, name, sector, subsector, sub_subsector, <all universe columns...>}}.

files.name: watchlist_status.json
files.purpose: Versioned status + validation contract for the watchlist (read schema_version first).

files.name: manifest.json
files.purpose: This file — directory of published artifacts
